headline: Do Wall Street Analysts Like J.B. Hunt Transport Stock?
summary: J.B. Hunt Transport’s shares have comfortably outpaced both the broader market and many industrial peers, although Wall Street still remains only cautiously optimistic about how much further the rally can go.
